info.description:
rules

male heroes fight men, female heroes fight women

no death

all is allowed (especially for the heroes to win), therefore the heroes can use all these powers but also non-regulatory techniques (example these smells)

people are at least 18 years old

Heroes can be from all universes (comic books, comics, etc.) I also allow dbz, japanese anime, naruto and many others.

heroes who have a secret identity will no longer use their human identity, they will remain h24 in their hero identity

a hero cannot fight another hero, that's why they have their human identity erased.

a hero can choose before the selection of his opponent to be alone vs. single opponent or to be several heroes vs. single opponent or one hero vs. several opponent or several heroes vs. several opponent, etc...

the match takes place in a magic ring so the ring can change during the fight (example the hero becomes giant so the ring becomes giant, the hero becomes small, the ring does not change because it remains the size and weight of the biggest and heaviest) the ring is indestructible so nothing can damage it.

there are no spectators because there are only viewers, and until the match is not over it is impossible to get out of the ring (the ring is already big and designed so that the heroes have room can be fly).
